title: Specify Custom Collation For Your Pipeline

sections.heading: About this Task
sections.body:
When entering a collation document, the `locale` field is mandatory. Default
collation field values vary depending on which locale you specify. To learn
more about supported languages and locales, see
[Collation Locales and Default Parameters](manual/reference/collation-locales-defaults).

sections.heading: Step 1: Click
sections.body:
- Select the collection.

- In the top-right corner of the pipeline builder, click
  **Options**.

![More Options](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/agg-builder-click-more-options.png)

sections.heading: Step 2: Enter your collation document
sections.body:
Next to the **Collation** field, enter your
[collation document](manual/reference/collation).

After you enter your collation document, the aggregation pipeline builder
considers the language-specific rules that you specified in your document.

sections.heading: Example
sections.body:
The following sample collation document specifies French as the chosen
`locale` and sorts uppercase letters before lowercase letters with the
`caseFirst` field:

```javascript
{
  locale: "fr",
  caseFirst: "upper"
}
```
